items.titolo: A month with Fitbit Premium on my Pixel Watch changed how I see AI health coaching

items.titolo: ByteDance and DeepSeek Are Placing Very Different AI Bets
items.descrizione: The diverging path of China’s two leading AI players shows where the country’s artificial intelligence industry is headed.
